title: Wire EndpointType into Endpoint.endpoint_type and MessageAction.action_type
description: Both fields are String but EndpointType enum already exists with from_uri/as_uri and full tests. Callers currently must call EndpointType::from_uri(&ep.endpoint_type) manually; the compile-time guarantee is absent. Fix: change Endpoint.endpoint_type from String to EndpointType and MessageAction.action_type from String to EndpointType. Update serde: EndpointType needs Serialize/Deserialize impls that delegate to as_uri/from_uri (same pattern as BodyType). Update all tests that compare the field as a string literal.
notes: Part of epic jmap-chat-tui-hqb: jmap-chat wire up enums — eliminate stringly-typed spec fields
